top_signals.title: Jobs slump as economy ‘held up by uncertainty’
top_signals.summary: The UK jobs market has been handed another blow as businesses ditch permanent hires as the economy battles against domestic and international uncertainty. The latest jobs report from KPMG and REC, the professional body for recruiters, showed hiring for permanent places dropped to a reading of 44.1 in May, which sits below the neutral 50 [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Speech by Commissioner Šefčovič at the Brussels Economic Security Forum
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Brussels, 05 Jun 2026 Ladies and gentlemen,
It is a pleasure to return to the Brussels Economic Security Forum, so let me thank the European Policy Centre for the invitation.
